body.title: Thread coherence — context retention score + self-monitoring signal
body.result: ThreadCoherenceSource (weighted Jaccard on bg_scoring.top, 30s rate limit, drift signal to TWM) + PROC_THREAD_DRIFT habit seeded. 20 tests. Commit 411a3945. Daemon kept resetting due to session timeout; work was complete and committed before first reset.
body.description: After each turn, compute context retention score: semantic overlap between activated nodes in turn N vs turn N-1 (from turn traces). Low overlap = thread drift. Push score into TWM as THREAD_COHERENCE signal. Two uses: (1) external metric — how well is D233/spreading activation maintaining conversational context? (2) self-monitoring — Igor detects his own drift and can flag/correct without human intervention. Same as Akien monitoring his own coherence. Substrate: turn traces (already exist). Implementation: background source reads last 2 turn traces, computes weighted node overlap, pushes TWM entry. Low score triggers self-observation habit. Prereq: T-spreading-activation.
